sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75786" key="ou)dopo/teros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐδοπότερος</orth>, <sense id="n75786.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὁπότερος</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐδοποτέρωσε</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὁποτέρωσε</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐδοπωσοῦν</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐδοπωστιοῦν</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὁπωσοῦν</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
